items.name: Party Fries
items.description: French fries topped with your choice of pulled pork or chili, queso, shredded cheese blend, bacon, sour cream, and chives.

items.name: Bologna Board
items.description: Smoked & flash fried bologna chunks accompanied with cheddar cheese, pickles, and buttery crackers.

items.name: Pig Platter
items.description: 3 rib bones, smoked & flash fried bologna chunks with cheddar cheese, buttery crackers, 3 BBQ sliders, French fries & pickles. Party Fries (+$4).

items.name: Basket of Rings
items.description: 10 oz golden and crispy onion rings with dressing/dipping sauce of choice.

items.name: Jalapeño Cornbread Basket
items.description: 6 homemade jalapeño cornbread muffins with home-made honey butter.

items.name: Chips with Queso and Salsa
items.description: House-made creamy queso dip and house-made salsa with tortilla chips.

items.name: Nachos
items.description: Choose one: grilled chicken, pulled pork, or chili. Bed of tortilla chips covered in a shredded cheese blend, creamy queso, grilled onions & peppers, salsa & sour cream.

items.name: Fried Pickles
items.description: 8 oz of hand-battered dill pickle chips with dressing/dipping sauce of choice.

items.name: Cheese Buttons
items.description: Fried cheddar & pepper jack cheese cubes served with ranch or honey mustard.

items.name: Quesadilla
items.description: Filled with choice of grilled chicken, house smoked pulled pork, or steamed veggies, shredded cheese blend, grilled onions & peppers. Side of sour cream & salsa.

items.name: RTT Dinner Salad
items.description: Spring mix lettuce with shredded cheese blend, onions, cucumber, tomato, and croutons. Add grilled chicken breast ($8), fried chicken ($8), salmon ($10), smoked pulled BBQ ($8), or chicken salad ($8).

items.name: Country Club Salad
items.description: Spring mix lettuce with shredded cheese blend, deli ham and turkey, bacon, boiled egg, tomato, and croutons.

items.name: Little Piggy Basket
items.description: 3 rib bones with fries.

items.name: Catfish Basket
items.description: 5 hand-breaded catfish strips served with slaw, fries & tartar sauce.

items.name: Chicken Tenders Basket
items.description: 4 hand breaded white meat chicken tenders served with fries and dipping sauce.

items.name: Pulled Pork Sliders
items.description: 3 house smoked pulled BBQ pork sliders topped with cole slaw & pickles.

items.name: Cheeseburger Sliders
items.description: 3 ground beef pattie sliders, American cheese, grilled onions & pickles.

items.name: Buffalo Sliders
items.description: 3 grilled/fried chicken sliders, tossed in buffalo sauce, provolone cheese & pickles.

items.name: Chicken Salad
items.description: Homemade chicken salad, provolone, lettuce & tomato. Sandwich or wrap.

items.name: Chicken Wrap
items.description: Grilled/fried chicken, provolone, lettuce & tomato.

items.name: Turkey Wrap
items.description: Smoked deli turkey, provolone, lettuce, & tomato.

items.name: Reuben
items.description: Thinly sliced corned beef or turkey grilled on toasted marble rye with provolone, sour kraut, & 1,000 island dressing.

items.name: Fish Sandwich
items.description: Fried catfish or cod with lettuce, tomato, & tartar sauce on brioche bun.

items.name: BBQ Sandwich
items.description: In-house slow smoked & hand pulled pork, topped with cole slaw, RT&T signature BBQ sauce & pickle.

items.name: The Club
items.description: 3 slices of white bread stacked & grilled ham, turkey, bacon, Swiss & American cheeses, lettuce, tomato & mayo.

items.name: Good Old Days Bologna
items.description: Thick slice of in-house smoked bologna, grilled/fried, American cheese, yellow mustard & pickle.

items.name: Pop's Chicken
items.description: 8 oz. breast grilled/fried, buffalo, or blackened. Pepper jack, cheddar, or Swiss cheese. Lettuce, tomato, onion & pickle.

items.name: Grown-Up Grilled Cheese
items.description: Cheddar and Swiss on white bread. Add bacon $2.

items.name: The Big Ripper
items.description: 7 oz flame-broiled beef patty (can sub turkey patty), American cheese with lettuce, onion, tomato, and pickle on brioche bun.

items.name: Smokin' Burger
items.description: 7 oz flame grilled beef patty covered in house-made BBQ sauce, bacon, cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato & onion tanglers on brioche bun.

items.name: Black Bean Burger
items.description: Hand-made black bean patty with choice of cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion & pickle.

items.name: Jalapeño Burger
items.description: 7 oz flame grilled patty covered in grilled jalapeños & cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato, crispy onion tanglers & chipotle mayo on brioche bun.

items.name: Big Kenny's Hibachi Bowl
items.description: Long grain wild rice, grilled squash, broccoli, water chestnuts, carrots & onions tossed in teriyaki sauce & topped with grilled pineapple & wonton strips. Add chicken: $5. Add salmon: $9.

items.name: Salmon
items.description: 6 oz. grilled or blackened & brushed with teriyaki sauce. Choice of 2 sides (one premium side included).

items.name: Rippy's Good Times Ribs
items.description: St. Louis style ribs, Rippy rubbed with signature family seasoning blend & smoked to perfection in house. Choice of 2 sides (one premium side included).

items.name: Rib-Eye
items.description: 12 oz tender & juicy grilled rib-eye cooked to desired temp. Choice of 2 sides (one premium side included).

items.name: Meat & 2
items.description: Served with jalapeño cornbread muffin. One premium side included.

items.name: Meat & 3
items.description: Served with jalapeño cornbread muffin. One premium side included.

items.name: 4 Veggie Plate
items.description: Served with jalapeño cornbread muffin.

items.name: Monkey Cake
items.description: Chocolate banana cake with mini chocolate chips and homemade chocolate icing, topped with a caramel drizzle & whipped cream. Add scoop vanilla ice cream $2.

items.name: Lexi's Elvis Cake
items.description: Moist yellow cake drenched in a sweet crushed pineapple glaze with cream cheese and pecan frosting.

items.name: Heritage Cherry Crunch
items.description: A warm cherry pie filling mixed with gooey yellow cake batter and toasted, buttery pecans – topped with whipped cream. Add scoop vanilla ice cream $2.

items.description: Ooey gooey butter, cream cheese, and yellow cake bar.
